# Mohsin Latif — AI Engineer & Data Scientist
# Berlin, Germany
# https://www.mohsinlatif.com

## About
Mohsin Latif is a Microsoft Certified AI Engineer and Data Scientist based in Berlin, Germany.
Currently working as a Data Analyst Working Student at BSH Hausgeräte GmbH, contributing to
the Shopfloor Analyzer project — an Industry 4.0 solution for production analytics.

## Current Role
- Position: Data Analyst Working Student
- Company: BSH Hausgeräte GmbH, Berlin, Germany
- Focus: IFP appliance log analysis, agentic AI diagnostics, Power BI dashboards

## Education
- M.Sc. Artificial Intelligence — Brandenburg University of Technology (BTU), Cottbus, Germany (2024–present)
- B.Sc. Computer Science (AI/Data Science) — COMSATS University Islamabad, Pakistan (2018–2022)

## Core Skills
- AI/ML: LLMs, RAG pipelines, LangGraph, Agentic AI, Azure AI Foundry, Azure OpenAI
- Data: Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Power BI, DAX, Neo4j, PostgreSQL
- Cloud: Microsoft Azure, Azure Cognitive Services, Azure Data Factory, Data Fabric
- Tools: Docker, Git, n8n, Grafana, Elasticsearch, Jira, Linux

## Microsoft Certifications
- DP-600: Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate (2024)
- DP-100: Azure Data Scientist Associate (2024)
- AI-102: Azure AI Engineer Associate (2023)
- Databricks Lakehouse Fundamentals (2023)
- Power BI Certificate — Xperiun (2022)
- AI/ML/DS Vocational Training — NAVTTC (2021)

## Key Projects
1. AI Compliance System for United Tires — RAG-based system processing 50k+ tire policies, 95% accuracy
2. Torrk.ai — Automated company profiling using DeepSeek + Llama, 70% effort reduction
3. Edulga — Educational Graph RAG with Neo4j and OpenAI for personalised learning

## Awards
- City & Provincial Level Winner — National Idea Bank Competition, Punjab, Pakistan (2021)
- Appreciation Award — ACM (Association of Computing Machinery), Lahore, Pakistan (2020)
